Docs.summary: A class representing a DataPolicyManifest along with the instance operations that can be performed on it. If you have a you can construct a from an instance of using the GetResource method. Otherwise you can get one from its parent resource using the GetDataPolicyManifests method.

Docs.summary:
This operation retrieves the data policy manifest with the given policy mode.
Request Path. /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/dataPolicyManifests/{policyMode}.
Operation Id. DataPolicyManifests_GetByPolicyMode.
Default Api Version. 2025-12-01-preview.
Resource. .
